item.title: Project 7: Database Breach & Administrative Data Exfiltration
item.description: Objective: To leverage a compromised web shell to gain unauthorized access to the backend MySQL database and exfiltrate the full user credential table.

item.title: Project 6: Web-to-System Pivot via Command Injection
item.description: Objective: To exploit a Command Injection vulnerability in a web application to bypass input filters and establish a persistent Remote Shell.

item.title: Project 5: Offline Cryptanalysis & Password Recovery
item.description: Objective: To utilize high-performance cracking tools to perform a dictionary attack against stolen MD5 hashes, successfully recovering plaintext credentials.

item.title: Project 4: Post-Exploitation & Sensitive Data Exfiltration
item.description: Objective: To leverage administrative access to extract the system’s “Shadow” file, demonstrating the ability to harvest encrypted credentials for offline analysis.

item.title: Project 3: Exploiting Infrastructure Vulnerabilities (Backdoor Access)
item.description: Objective: To execute a remote command execution (RCE) exploit against a backdoored FTP service to gain unauthorized administrative access to the target host.

item.title: Project 2: Service Enumeration & Vulnerability Research
item.description: Objective: To perform deep-packet inspection and service fingerprinting on a target host to identify exploitable entry points within the infrastructure.

item.title: Project 1: Defensive Lab Environment & Network Configuration
item.description: Objective: To design and deploy a secure, isolated virtualization environment for controlled penetration testing and vulnerability analysis.

item.title: About
item.description: Cybersecurity enthusiast dedicated to uncovering, mitigating, and monitoring infrastructure and web application vulnerabilities.

item.title: Contact Me
item.description:
Get in Touch

If you have a professional project in mind, a specific technical inquiry, or an employment opportunity, please use the form below to get in touch.
